title: DeskDine - Restaurant Order Management
description:
Designed a high-contrast UI system for a restaurant order management platform using neo-brutalism aesthetic.

Key Contributions:
• Designed overall look and feel using neo-brutalism aesthetic
• Arranged Bento Box grid layout prioritizing critical order information
• Applied continuous improvements based on early feedback
• Enhanced button accessibility and color contrast

Design Specifications:
• High-contrast UI kit with Burnt Orange/Off-White color scheme
• Thin gray borders optimized for high-glare cafe counter environments
• Improved navigation flow for seamless staff interaction
• Accessibility-first design approach
shortDescription: Neo-brutalism UI design for restaurant order management system
